answer:
Tarzan renounces his heritage to ensure Jane Porter's happiness, as she has become engaged to his cousin William Cecil Clayton, who unknowingly holds the Greystoke title. By concealing his true identity as the rightful Earl of Greystoke, Tarzan allows Jane to marry William without complication. His choice prioritizes her well-being over reclaiming his inheritance.

\boxed{\text{Tarzan renounces his heritage to ensure Jane's happiness, allowing her to marry his cousin William Clayton without conflict.}}
